name: AI Social Video Content Planner with Captions and Logging
description: Generates a social media video content plan with Claude AI, creates optimized captions and hashtags, logs content to Google Sheets for tracking, and notifies via Slack. Designed for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.

source.originalName: Auto-generate and post Instagram reels with Veo3, OpenAI, and Blotato

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for trend research

contentTopic.description: Topic or niche for social video content (e.g. 'AI productivity tips', 'cooking hacks')

numberOfPosts.description: Number of content ideas to generate

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID for content calendar

steps.name: Build Exa query for trending social content
Build Claude prompt for content plan generation
Generate content plan with Claude AI
Parse Claude output and strip fences
Build rows for Google Sheets content calendar
Log content plan to Google Sheets
Notify Slack of content plan completion
